item.title: ITR8: Thinking in Problems and Solutions
item.description:
ITR8: Thinking in Problems and Solutions
When I am deep in problem-solving, I don’t think in neat project hierarchies. I think in problems and solutions. One leads to another. Solutions improve through iteration. Problems decompose into smaller pieces. And

item.title: Judgment: Exploring its repellant qualities
item.description:
Judgment
This piece is part of my exploring how emotions work. Rather than explore them exclusively as sensations or nearly spiritual experiences, I find it interesting to explore them as agents of motion. This piece began with a conv
